title: POST /books creates books with all fields

title: Data stored in SQLite

title: JSON responses with correct status codes
evidence: main.go:25-33 writeJSON/writeError helpers; handlers return 201/200/400/404/204 appropriately

title: Input validation for title and author
Working source code
evidence: Code builds successfully; go build passes
